name: VK3 Fashion
role: Logo Design · Visual Design · Flyer Design
desc: An early-stage fashion brand seeking a clear, confident and versatile logo as well as a flyer design to promote their business. The challenge was delivering a strong, recognizable mark that could work across digital and print contexts from day one — with no visual equity to build on.
brief: An early-stage fashion brand seeking a clear, confident and versatile logo as well as a flyer design to promote their business. The challenge was delivering a strong, recognizable mark that could work across digital and print contexts from day one — with no visual equity to build on.
overview: An early-stage fashion brand seeking a clear, confident and versatile logo as well as a flyer design to promote their business. The challenge was delivering a strong, recognizable mark that could work across digital and print contexts from day one — with no visual equity to build on.
